data.title: BlackRock and Fidelity Predicted to Join XRP ETF Race by Top Analyst, SHIB Team Addresses Concerns on Shytoshi Kusama's Silence: Crypto News Digest by U.Today
data.description:
Looking for key updates in the crypto space over the past day? Read U. Today's daily news digest!
source: https://u.today/blackrock-and-fidelity-predicted-to-join-xrp-etf-race-by-top-analyst-shib-team-addresses-concerns

data.title: U.S. Justice Department uncovers Hamas terrorism financing scheme, seizes approximately $200,000 worth of crypto
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, the U.S. Department of Justice announced that it had cracked an ongoing terrorist financing scheme and seized approximately $201,400 (at current value) in cryptocurrencies stored in wallets and accounts designed to fund Hamas. The seized funds came from Hamas fundraising addresses, allegedly controlled by Hamas, and these addresses have been used to launder more than $1.5 million in virtual currency since October 2024.

data.title: Analyst: Bitcoin appears to be severely undervalued compared to gold and real estate markets
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Crypto analyst PlanB wrote on the X platform: "Compared with the gold and real estate markets, Bitcoin seems to be seriously undervalued. The market value of Bitcoin is 2 trillion US dollars, while gold is 20 trillion US dollars. The scarcity of Bitcoin (S2F ratio) is 120 years, while gold is 60 years."

data.title: SEC Chair Nominee Pledges Collaboration with Cryptocurrency Entities
data.description: According to Foresight News, U.S. President Donald Trump's nominee for the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) Chair, Paul Atkins, has expressed his commitment to working with cryptocurrency entities. During a Senate hearing, Atkins stated he is "certain" about collaborating with DOGE and other organizations seeking to enhance the efficiency of the SEC.

data.title: Circle Launches USDCKit to Simplify USDC Payment Integration and Automation
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Circle announced the launch of USDCKit, a developer-friendly SDK (software development kit) for PSPs to integrate and automate USDC payments and support large-scale operations. It is reported that USDCKit is specially built for Circle Wallets, which can realize cross-border payments and simplify fund operations through stablecoins.

data.title: Paul Atkins, the incoming chairman of the US SEC: If the nomination is confirmed, he will cooperate with DOGE
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that Paul Atkins, the nominee for chairman of the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission, attended the confirmation hearing of the Senate Banking, Housing and Urban Affairs Committee. He said that if the nomination is confirmed, he will cooperate with Musk's Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE).

data.title: Coinbase Advanced to Launch BNB Perpetual Contracts
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Coinbase Advanced is adding support for $BNB perpetual contracts, and the BNB-PERP market will open on or after 9:30 am (UTC) on April 3, 2025.

data.title: USDC Treasury Mints 50 Million USDC on Ethereum Blockchain
data.description: According to PANews, Whale Alert has reported that the USDC Treasury has minted an additional 50 million USDC on the Ethereum blockchain. This development highlights ongoing activities within the cryptocurrency sector, as digital currencies continue to play a significant role in financial transactions and blockchain technology advancements.

data.title: Cross-border remittance app Abound completes $14 million financing, led by NEAR Foundation
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Abound, a cross-border remittance application, announced that it has completed a $14 million financing, led by NEAR Foundation, with participation from Circle Ventures, Times Internet and other investors. The company plans to use the new funds to expand its business scope, increase product categories, and improve technical infrastructure, and plans to gradually enter markets such as Canada, Singapore and the UAE. (TechCrunch)

data.title: Stride's AI Agent Echos to Cease Operations on May 1
data.description: According to Foresight News, the AI agent Echos, developed by the Cosmos ecosystem's liquid staking protocol Stride, will shut down on May 1. The announcement highlighted that Echos has been in an experimental phase, but unfortunately, it has experienced low adoption rates. Additionally, the overall AI agent market has significantly contracted. Users are advised to withdraw their funds before the permanent closure on May 1.
